## Summary

- describe the change in one or two bullets
- state whether it changes theme behavior, release automation, or documentation

## Release impact

- [ ] no release expected (`docs:` or `chore:` only)
- [ ] patch (`fix:`)
- [ ] minor (`feat:`)
- [ ] major (`feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:`)

## Validation

- [ ] commit title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] `jq empty themes/*.json`
- [ ] README updated if install, usage, or theme lineup changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG impact is understood
- [ ] theme names remain stable unless this is an intentional breaking change

## Notes

Add any screenshots, before/after comparisons, or theme rationale here.
